home.title: blowing fresh ideas.

metadata.title: Homeserver and Nextcloud Support
metadata.description: Setup and support for self-hosted homeservers, Nextcloud, remote access, backups, and practical daily workflows.

homeserver.title: Nextcloud and homeserver help
homeserver.copy: I help people set up a practical self-hosted system around Nextcloud and a small homeserver. That can include planning hardware, configuring host and installations with docker, remote access, backups, updates, file sync, and the basic security steps needed to keep the setup usable.
homeserver.detailsTitle: One home system, six daily tools
homeserver.detailsCopy: Nextcloud can bring contacts, calendar, notes, tasks, passwords, and file management into one place at home, so everyday data stays centralized on a system you control.

contacts.name: Contacts
contacts.description: A shared address book for people, companies, and quick reachability.

calendar.name: Calendar
calendar.description: Appointments, reminders, and family or team scheduling in one place.

notes.name: Notes
notes.description: Simple synced notes for ideas, checklists, and household information.

tasks.name: Tasks
tasks.description: Track what needs doing without scattering reminders across apps.

passwords.name: Passwords
passwords.description: A practical home base for credentials and sensitive shared access.

files.name: Files
files.description: Central file management and sync across laptop, phone, and home server.

homeserver.helpTitle: From first box to working daily setup

planning.title: Planning and hardware
planning.description: Choosing a realistic machine, storage layout, and network setup for your home or small office.

installation.title: Nextcloud installation
installation.description: Help with installing Nextcloud, connecting storage, setting up user accounts, sync clients, and practical apps for the common usecases.

support.title: Remote or onsite support
support.description: Support can happen remotely or onsite, depending on what is easier for the job and your location.

homeserver.pricingCopy: Homeserver and Nextcloud support is offered at 15 EUR per hour. Remote sessions and onsite help are both possible.

metadata.title: Bike Repair in Bielefeld
metadata.description: Practical bicycle repair help in and around Bielefeld for everyday maintenance and common issues.

bikeRepair.title: Bike repair in and around Bielefeld
bikeRepair.copyOne: I help with practical bicycle repairs for city bikes, trekking bikes, and everyday transport bikes in and around Bielefeld. The focus is on reliable fixes, clear communication, and getting your bike back into regular use without turning a simple repair into a drama.
bikeRepair.copyTwo: Typical jobs include punctures, brake adjustments, chain and cassette work, gear tuning, replacing worn parts, and general maintenance checks before a bike becomes annoying or unsafe to ride.

drivetrain.title: Brakes, gears, and drivetrain
drivetrain.description: Adjustment and replacement work for the parts that most often make a bike noisy, slow, or frustrating to use.

wear.title: Flat tires and worn parts
wear.description: Tube and tire changes, chain wear checks, cables, brake pads, and the common fixes that keep a commuter bike dependable.

handoff.title: Onsite or arranged handoff
handoff.description: Depending on the job and distance, support can happen onsite in the Bielefeld area or through an arranged dropoff and pickup.

bikeRepair.pricingCopy: Bike repair support is offered at 15 EUR per hour. Parts are billed separately when replacements are needed.
